title: Wrong currency formula field and single currency widgets.

posts.author: Harrym (Harry Morgan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We use a deal value field multiplied by a % depending on the stage. Therfor giving a forcasted value.
The deal value is a numbers field set to pounds. The formula field shows dollar. Making any adjustement to the formula field then breaks any widget using that to report monthly forcast figures. The widgets on charts only appear to report in dollars and we can’t change this.
Meaning either I change everything to USD for a compnay who works in pound or Ihave dashboards that are confuding.

What are you trying to achieve

Multicurrency widgets (or global setting)
To enable a sales dashboard reporting in GBP (or other) not USD.
